uk: Свв. мучеників Назарія, Гервасія, Протасія й Келсія
saints.en: Sts. Martyrs Nazarius, Gervasius, Protasius & Celsus. Ven. Parasceva of Tarnovo. Blessed Hieromartyr Roman Lysko, Presbyter

rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир мчч., Сл.: мчч., І нині: богород. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар мчч., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря мчч. і за днем тижня.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар мчч. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря мчч. Катизми черг., сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон Октоїха і мчч. На 9-ій пісні – «Чеснішу від херувимів». По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: світильний мчч., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар мчч., Сл., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря мчч. і за днем тижня.
Часи: на 1-му – дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – мчч.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – Кол. 251 зач.; 1, 18-23. Єв. – Лк. 37 зач.; 8, 22-25.

troparion_en.text: Let us praise the fourfold company of martyrs: / Nazarius, Protase, Gervase and Celsus. / For they preached the Trinity to all / and by their contest dispelled the worship of idols. / Through their prayers, O Christ God, have mercy on us all.

matched_oca_saint: Martyrs Gervasius, Nazarius, Protasius, and Celsus of Milan

oca_saints.name: Martyrs Gervasius, Nazarius, Protasius, and Celsus of Milan

troparion.text: Let us praise the fourfold company of martyrs: / Nazarius, Protase, Gervase and Celsus. / For they preached the Trinity to all / and by their contest dispelled the worship of idols. / Through their prayers, O Christ God, have mercy on us all.

You loved the solitary and hesychastic life, /  and then, with diligence, you hastened after Christ, your Bridegroom, and took up His easy yoke in your youth.  / Armed with the Sign of the Cross,  / you contended courageously against noetic enemies; /  through fasting, prayer, and by shedding tears,  / you extinguished the embers of the passions, O glorious Paraskevḗ. /  Now, standing in the heavenly Bridal Chamber of Christ, together with the wise virgins,  /  intercede for us who honor your holy memory.

kontakion.text: Devoutly let us all praise the most honorable Paraskevḗ,  / a holy intercessor for the afflicted;  / for she left this perishable life behind and received eternal incorruption.  / Therefore, she has been given the grace of working miracles, by the command of God.

oca_saints.name: Venerable Nicholas Sviatosha Prince of Chernigov, and Wonderworker of the Kiev Near Caves

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Nicholas, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation, O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, you defended the Faith, / even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Silvanus, entreat Christ God to save our souls.
